description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstract representation of a human figure, with elongated and angular surfaces that do not resemble natural human anatomy. The form is dominated by sharp, planar facets with a mix of blue, black, and peach tones, suggesting a stylized or glitched digital rendering. Two small, upright elements protrude from the top surface, possibly intended to represent arms or accessories, but their scale and placement are inconsistent with typical human proportions. The overall structure is irregular, with large, flat areas and abrupt changes in geometry, lacking clear definition of limbs, torso, or head. The surface finish is mostly smooth with some reflective qualities, and the object does not display any recognizable clothing or accessories. The visual impression is more of a fragmented, low-quality digital artifact than a realistic pedestrian adult.
description: A highly abstract, angular, and distorted humanoid form with sharp surfaces and a mix of blue, black, and peach colors, lacking clear anatomical features.
description_view_0: From this view, two small upright protrusions are visible on a mostly flat, blue-toned surface, with angular facets and a peach-colored section.
description_view_1: This angle shows a dark, sharply angled surface with a prominent peach-colored edge and little detail, emphasizing the irregular geometry.
description_view_2: Here, the two upright elements are seen from the side, set against a mix of blue and peach surfaces with pronounced angularity.
description_view_3: This perspective highlights the elongated, sloped blue surface with a single upright element visible, and more of the peach and black angular facets.
attribute_clothing_type: indistinguishable due to abstract and distorted form
attribute_posture: indistinguishable due to abstract and distorted form
attribute_footwear_type: indistinguishable due to abstract and distorted form
